jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at iCliniq
jsonLd.description:
iCliniq invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iCliniq:
iCliniq is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq!
